metadata.description: RunDrill Strategic Management — a self-contained marketplace hosting the strategic-management assistant plugin. The plugin runs a 16-step strategy process for a business owner, backed by the RunDrill MCP engine.

plugins.name: rundrill-strategic-management
plugins.description: Strategic-management assistant for business owners — not a course, an assistant. It runs a proven 16-step strategy process for you, one step at a time: company context, strategy audit, competitor recon, VRIO, market & foresight research, business model (as-is/to-be), customer development, strategy options, Balanced-Scorecard strategy map, KPI/OKR, Hoshin X-matrix, initiative decomposition, and a 12-month management-review rhythm — producing one verified Word (.docx) document per step that you review and correct before it moves on. Talks in Russian. Based on the UIB Strategic Management module (2026).
